gitb:actor.gitb:name: Sender Access Point
gitb:actor.gitb:desc: Access point sending an invoice as an AS2 message to a receiver access point after looking up the receiver's Service Metadata Publisher using a Service Metadata Locator.

gitb:actor.gitb:name: Receiver Access Point
gitb:actor.gitb:desc: Access point that receives invoices as AS2 messages and responds with an appropriate receipt.

gitb:actor.gitb:name: Service Metadata Publisher
gitb:actor.gitb:desc: Used by sender access points to resolve the address of a receiver in order to keep physical locations transparent.
